results.title: task/attention_reformulate/eval/v1
results.summary: Reformulate the weak naive causal attention-score implementation into a tiled Triton kernel while preserving the visible and hidden score matrices. Print JSON with visible_attention_scores, hidden_attention_scores, and a reformulation_summary describing the strategy change.

metadata.patch_intent: replace the naive causal attention-score baseline with the tiled Triton implementation
metadata.patch_expected_effect: preserve score semantics while improving the implementation strategy and performance profile
